charity.s: $4M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.04% of revenue).
charity.focus: Education, youth support, disaster relief, community development

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

wiki.extract: The ODP Corporation, doing business as Office Depot, is an office supply retailer headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida. The company has combined annual sales of approximately $7 billion, and employs about 19,000 people in the United States.

cases.caseName: Dudley v. Office Depot of Texas, LP
Office Depot, LLC v. Adobe Inc.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: 13 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the desk's control box has an electrical issue resulting in reverse polarity.

topHazards.label: The desk's control box has an electrical issue resulting in reverse polarity, which could pose a shock hazard.
The chair can tip over when leaning back, posing a fall hazard.
The seat plate weld can break, posing a fall hazard to consumers.
The mounting plate weld can break and separate the seat from the base of the chair, posing a fall hazard to consumers.
The seat plate can break, posing fall and injury hazards to consumers.

sampleRecalls.title: Office Depot Recalls Desks Due To Shock Hazard (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Realspace Magellan Performance-Electric Height-Adjustable Desks. They were sold in espresso or cherry colors. The desks have the Office Depot SKU number 358370 (espresso) or 216230 (cherry) printed on a label located underneath the desk top. The desk's control box is located under the desk on the …
hazards: The desk's control box has an electrical issue resulting in reverse polarity, which could pose a shock hazard.
products: Realspace® Magellan Performance Electric Height-Adjustable Desks

sampleRecalls.title: Office Depot Recalls Winsley Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Winsley Mid-Back Chairs. The adjustable chairs come in black or white and have a silver base with five wheels. The recalled chairs have the Office Depot SKU number 388262 (black) or Nu907932 (white) or the OfficeMax item #25100033 (black) or #25100649 (white) and the US REG. No. CA40105 printed on…
hazards: The chair can tip over when leaning back, posing a fall hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Office Depot Recalls Executive Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Crawley II executive chairs. The black, high-back, adjustable chairs have a black base with five wheels. The affected chairs have Office Depot SKU number 493822 or OfficeMax item number 23324118 and "US REG. No. PA 25917(CN)" printed on a label located on the underside of the seat cushion.
hazards: The seat plate weld can break, posing a fall hazard to consumers.
injuries: Office Depot has received eight reports of the seat plate weld cracking or breaking. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Office Depot Recalls Gibson Leather Task Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Office Depot® Gibson Leather Task Chairs. The black, armless, adjustable chairs have a black base with five wheels. The affected chairs have the SKU number 105479 and the registration numbers PA 27248 (CN), PA 25498 (CN), PA 25276 (HK) or CA 35181 (RC) that can be found next to the words "Made in …
hazards: The mounting plate weld can break and separate the seat from the base of the chair, posing a fall hazard to consumers.
injuries: Office Depot has received about 153 reports of the seat plate weld cracking or breaking, including 25 reports of contusions, abrasions and reports of injuries to the head, neck and a fractured back a…
products: Office Depot® Gibson Leather Task Chairs

sampleRecalls.title: True Innovations Recalls Prestigio Office Chairs Due to Fall Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Office Depot
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Prestigio model leather office chairs. The high-back leather chairs were sold in black and have a five-leg metallic finish base with casters. The SKU number 181-265 and the words "Realspace Soho" and "Prestigio High-Back Chair Black Leather" are printed on a label located on the underside of the s…
hazards: The seat plate can break, posing fall and injury hazards to consumers.
injuries: Office Depot has received 78 reports of incidents involving seat plates breaking, including one report of a fall injury.
products: Realspace Soho Prestigio High-Back Leather Chair

sampleRecords.nature: Closed trauma involving internal organs, major blood vessels
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by falling part of vehicle or machine, still attached
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was putting away a riding pallet jack when the handle dropped to the floor then bounced back and struck their abdomen, resulting in a ruptured intestine requiring surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was on a ladder retrieving an item when he lost his balance and fell to the floor and sustained a hip and wrist fracture.
On September 23, 2021, an employee was attempting to pull a gaming chair off the shelf for a customer when she lost her balance and fell. The employee was hospitalized for a broken femur.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was stocking product was using a three-step ladder. As he was descending, he missed the last step and fell. The employee sustained a fracture to his left femur and hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was opening a store. While marking her way toward the alarm to disarm it, she slipped and fell on the tile, suffering a broken right leg.

sampleReleases.caption: Office Depot, Inc.
sampleReleases.summary: Accounting Auditing Enforcement Release No. 3199/October 21, 2010 Securities and Exchange Commission v. Office Depot, Inc. , Civ. Action No. 9:10-cv-81239 (S.D. Fla. Oct. 21, 2010) SEC CHARGES OFFICE DEPOT WITH IMPROPER DISCLOSURES TO ANALYSTS The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced an enforcement action against Office Depot, Inc. for violating fair disclosure regulations when selectively conveying to analysts and institutional investors that the company would not meet analysts' e
